Download the application form from the DRDO website www.drdo.gov.in (see “What’s New” section). Fill out the form completely and attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents. SC/ST/OBC candidates must attach a valid caste certificate in the format prescribed by the Central Government. Write the name of the subject applied for on the envelope. Submit by post or in person to: Director, Defence Scientific Information & Documentation Centre (DESIDOC), Metcalfe House, Civil Lines, Delhi – 110054, within 21 days from the date of advertisement.
